title: Cast Partial Frameworks
short_description: Metal framework solutions for removable partial denture cases.
description: Cast partial frameworks are produced for retention, support and patient comfort. Design review focuses on clasp placement, connector strength, tissue adaptation and a clean finish for removable partial denture cases.

gallery.caption: Framework design and finishing focused on retention, support and comfortable adaptation.

gallery.caption: Upper framework view showing connector design, retention zones and model adaptation.

gallery.caption: Cast partial denture example combining metal support with removable prosthetic finishing.
Metal framework detail showing clasp arms, mesh retention and polished finish.

gallery.alt: Close-up of chrome cobalt cast partial framework with clasps and rests
gallery.caption: Detail view of clasps, rests, mesh retention and polished metal surfaces.

gallery.alt: Technician checking cast partial framework seating on a model
gallery.caption: Seating review on the master model before finishing and delivery.
